subject: Complaint
message: My order has been delayed for 4 days and there is still no shipping update.

subject: Complaint
message: I received a different product than the one I ordered.
reply: We apologize for the mistake. The correct product will be shipped within 48 hours.

subject: Inquiry
message: The payment was deducted, but my order has not been confirmed yet. Please check my order status.

subject: Inquiry
message: I would like to know if I can cancel my order before it is shipped.
reply: Your order has been successfully canceled and the refund has been processed.

subject: Inquiry
message: I recently placed an order, but I cannot see its status in my account dashboard. Could you confirm if it has been processed?
reply: Your order has been confirmed and is currently being processed. You can track it from the Orders page.

subject: Inquiry
message: Is it possible to change the shipping address after placing an order?

subject: Complaint
message: The product I received is damaged and does not match the description on the website.
